what_it_does: Records a design-source image asset (pitch-deck/p-12.jpg) in the ledger using YAML frontmatter metadata plus a short source ground-truth note.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, source, author_session, created, and an empty links array
Image width and height are both 0
Body contains only the line 'SOURCE design ground-truth — pitch-deck/p-12.jpg'
standouts: Marked explicitly as SOURCE design ground-truth
Image dimensions w and h are 0
Blob reference is present but links array is empty
conventions: Uses the ledger markdown file format with YAML frontmatter
Uses image:// and blob:// URI schemes
Empty links array when no relationships are declared
concerns: Width and height are 0, suggesting dimensions were not populated
Empty links array leaves the asset isolated from related pitch-deck pages or design artifacts
notes: A metadata stub for pitch-deck slide 12 image asset, flagged as design-source ground truth but missing size and relationship data.
questions: Why are the image width and height set to 0?
What does the blob b2:c1b0fad805f301afe5f85294b8562d4c resolve to?
Should links include relationships to the pitch-deck page or related design artifacts?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to catalog a design-source image; the file does that at the metadata level, but the zero dimensions and empty links make it an incomplete record.
intention_signals: To register a pitch-deck image as a stable, addressable design-source artifact within the channel memory ledger.
contribution: Provides an addressable ledger entry and blob pointer for a pitch-deck image, supporting retrieval and provenance tracking in the design-source channel.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for the pitch-deck/p-12.jpg design-source image, including a blob pointer, zero dimensions, an empty links array, and a source ground-truth label.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a pitch-deck slide image as a traceable design-source asset.
